last_prompt: Evaluate the adaptive re-planning on failure (impl-7) and typed artefact store (impl-8) implementations. Verify: 1) After exceeding the replan threshold, the re-planner agent is invoked and produces a modified task list that is persisted correctly; 2) Circular dependency and duplicate ID guards reject invalid re-planner outputs; 3) Artefact outputs are persisted after task completion and correctly injected into downstream task prompts; 4) Tasks without inputs/outputs fields behave identically to pre-impl-8 behaviour (backward compatibility); 5) All new unit tests pass with 'cargo test'; 6) 'cargo clippy -- -D warnings' reports no issues. Document any defects found as new fix tasks.
